Yes, your Wing Assistant only works on your tasks during the agreed-upon hours. What hours will my assistant work? That's your choice! Wing Assistants work for clients worldwide - we can handle any timezone. Can I access Wing Assistant worldwide? You can access Wing Assistant anywhere in the world! Please note that Wing can only communicate with you and external parties in English (except for bilingual Assistants). Reach out to our sales team if you require an Assistant who can speak other languages. What does “unlimited work” mean? You can give as much work as you need to be done within the agreed-upon hours for the day. However, how fast your Assistant completes the tasks depends on several factors. These include the type of work, the complexity of the tasks, and how much other work your Assistant is doing for you. Do you provide 24/7 coverage? Although 24/7 coverage is available, we don’t offer it by default. Your Assistants are typically available 4 or 8 hours a day, five days a week. Clients choose the time bracket but can’t break up the hours; each Assistant must have an ongoing block of working hours. If you’d like to inquire about different coverage options (8/7, 16/5, 16/7, 24/5, 24/7), please reach out to us. How do I communicate with Wing? Wing has the following methods available: Web app Slack integration Mobile app for iOS & Android Dedicated phone number (call & texts) Email, WhatsApp, Microsoft Teams, or custom methods are available upon request. Who are my assistants? Wing Assistants are based worldwide – they are typically college-educated, fluent English speakers who have undergone a rigorous vetting process and an in-depth training and testing program. All Assistants are supervised by talented Managers and have a team they can rely on for help. Our Assistants are compensated at higher-than-market salaries and incentivized by your happiness! How long does it take to get replies? Wing guarantees a reply time of 3 minutes. Within this time, your Assistant should be able to notify you when they’ll start working on your request or provide an update on their progress. How long the work itself takes depends on how complex the tasks are. Nevertheless, you can be sure your Assistant will do high-quality work. Wing Assistants undergo weeks of training, are highly educated, and speak English (mostly on top of at least another language). Can Wing integrate with software I use? Yes. Wing can use any software you use, e.g., Salesforce, Trello, Later, Hootsuite, etc. How does customer support work? Wing has excellent Customer Support, available round the clock on all plans. Wing guarantees a reply within one business day on any support matter, but you typically get a reply within a few hours. You can contact Wing Support via the web app or ask your Assistant to relay a concern, question, or item of feedback to Wing Support. You also get a dedicated Client Success Manager who can help you with any aspect of the Wing experience. Click below to check it out: CLICK TO CHECK OUT OUR EMAIL PLAYBOOK How To Use Mailscoop To Level Up Your Job Search Welcome to Mailscoop, a networking tool you can use to easily find the email addresses of people you want to network with. Whether you're looking for a recruiter, a hiring manager, a CEO, or some other decision maker - Mailscoop can help you find their email address (or share its best guess!). If you've never used an email lookup tool before, no worries! Keep scrolling to learn exactly how to use this thing, as well as more info around email finders in general so you understand how they work. Finally, we'll walk through some frequently ask questions so you can get easy answers! Ready? Here we go: How To Find Contact Information In 3 Simple Steps The great part about Mailscoop (besides the fact that it's free) is that it's incredibly easy to use! All you need to get started are three pieces of information: Your contact's first name Your contact's last name A link to the website of the company where your contact works Let's say we wanted to find our CEO, Austin Belcak’s, email address. We already know his full name so we just need a link to his company’s website (cultivatedculture.com). With that in mind, our search would look like this: How Do You Know You Have The Right Email Address? Great question! While email lookup tools like Mailscoop are super helpful, they're still making educated guesses based on publicly available data. When you search for an email, Mailscoop tries to find a match based on public data (for example, the email being posted on the internet somewhere). If it can’t find an email with that method, it will make an educated guess based on public information such as email taxonomies and formats. Due to this, email lookup tools are never going to be 100% accurate 100% of the time due to a variety of factors. That’s why Mailscoop gives you a confidence score. When you run a search, you’ll get 3 different confidence levels: We’re pretty confident this is the right email We couldn't verify this email, this is our best guess We couldn’t find this email or ran into an error If you get the green dot, you’re good to go! We’re super confident this is a valid email address since Mailscoop was able to verify it using public data. If you get the yellow dot, this means that the email might be valid but it’s probably worth confirming before you send. If you get the red dot, this means that we couldn’t find any solid information on the email or taxonomies and formats. This usually happens when there’s an issue with the domain or that the company’s taxonomies aren’t publicly available. What To Do If You Get A Yellow Or Red Dot? If you get a yellow or red dot, it’s worth trying to confirm the email address. One option we recommend is VerifyEmailAddress.org . Simply plug in the email address that Mailscoop gave you and it will run a search to verify the email: What If Mailscoop Couldn’t Find The Email Address I Was Looking For? No email lookup tool out there is going to be 100% accurate 100% of the time. All of them, including Mailscoop, are making educated guesses based on the information they have. There are a whole bunch of reasons why Mailscoop might not return an email address. The company's email server may not allow for verification and / or they may have systems in place to confuse verification systems. There may be several people with the same (or similar) names and Mailscoop is having trouble differentiating. There may be a funky email convention that the company uses for some of their employees' emails. For example, Austin’s email at Microsoft was a weird combination of his first and last name in a single word. Email finders have a hard time with those. We'd rather tell you we can't find a match than give you one we're not 100% sure about or can’t make an educated guess on. If Mailscoop can't find the email of the person you're looking for, you have a couple of options: Try Different Formats With Mailtester VerifyEmailAddress.org - Since we know that VerifyEmailAddress will validate the right emails, you can try plugging in different combos to see if something fits. For example: [first name]@website.com [first name].[last name]@website.com [first initial][last name]@website.com [first name][last initial]@website.com [first name]_[last name]@website.com Etc. Reach Out Via Another Medium - Another option is to reach out via another platform. We recommend any channel where they're professionally active. LinkedIn, Twitter, Quora, and Medium are all great examples. We don’t recommend reaching out to anyone via personal channels. What To Say In Your Emails: Job-Winning Email Templates & Examples Finding someone’s email is a great first step! But what do you say? How do you start a conversation with a total stranger, especially when you want something from them? We’ve got you covered! Our Job Search Email Playbook is a 100+ page guide that covers our entire philosophy for job-winning email communication. It also comes with 25+ templates and examples for every job search situation you’ll come across. You can learn more and grab a copy here: The Job Search Email Playbook Remove the guesswork with my all-in-one guide to effortless, offer-winning job search communication. 25+ Email Templates & Examples For Every Job Search Scenario 5+ Data-Backed Tips For Boosting Your Email Response Rates Austin's Proven Cold Email Testing Methodology Online Email Template Library For Easy Copying & Pasting CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE Mailscoop’s Purpose And Your Obligation To Use It With Integrity Mailscoop was built to help job seekers respectfully build their networks to improve their outcomes. Our networking strategies focus on connecting with people in ways that are high integrity, thoughtful, and respectful. That is the only way that the information Mailscoop provides should be used. We do not recommend or condone reaching out to people and simply asking for jobs, referrals, or the like. That approach is more likely to frustrate your contacts than it is to generate the results you’re looking for. It’s also not aligned with our philosophy of respectful outreach. Instead, we advise taking a thoughtful approach to building an authentic and genuine relationship with the person you are contacting. This article provides some context around our networking philosophies along with some examples to help illustrate this point (though respectful outreach isn’t limited to the contents of that article alone). Important: Mailscoop was not built for commercial purposes or to be used with malicious intent. By using Mailscoop, you acknowledge and agree not to use the tool for any malicious or commercial purpose and you expressly accept any liability that comes from any use for prohibited purposes. Using Mailscoop for any purpose other than to respectfully network is absolutely prohibited and a violation of our site’s Terms of Use . By using the tool you agree to those terms and assume all liability for the actions you take with the information Mailscoop provides. Featured In What is MailScoop.io ? Find Emails, Connect With Anyone, Build Your Network Mailscoop.io is a networking tool that helps job seekers find anyone’s professional email in just a few seconds. Simply enter your contact’s name and company website, then Mailscoop will do the rest. We take the guesswork out of finding contact information so you can focus on respectfully building relationships and landing more referrals at your target companies. Why did we create MailScoop.io ? You’ve probably heard that your network is your net worth. That’s especially true in the job search. Data shows that referrals make up the majority of hires in today’s market. But if you want to network? You need to know how to get in touch. Mailscoop is a tool that helps job seekers find contact information for recruiters, potential referrals, and hiring managers. The goal of this tool is to enable job seekers to respectfully connect with employees and hiring managers in order to build relationships and land referrals. How To Use Mailscoop To Network In 3 Easy Steps Using Mailscoop is easy! Here’s how you can use it to find contact information for networking connections in just a few seconds: Step #1 Identify a contact that you want to reach out to. You just need their name and their company’s website. Step #2 Enter your contact’s information into Mailscoop and run your search. Step #3 Mailscoop will use publicly available information to identify their email or make an educated guess. It will also give you a confidence score. Find an email address > Mailscoop Has Helped Job Seekers Network And Land Referrals At Top Companies How Does Mailscoop Work And What Should You Know About Using It? We built Mailscoop to offer a tool for job seekers to respectfully build their networks. Here is more information about how it works and how it should be used: Where Does Mailscoop Get It's Data? Mailscoop only uses data from publicly available sources. If Mailscoop has found an email address in a public space on the internet, it will provide that email in its results. If it can’t find an email, it will make an educated guess based on publicly available data (email taxonomies, formats, etc). How Should Mailscoop Be Used? Mailscoop should only be used for authentic and respectful networking purposes. Under no circumstances is Mailscoop intended for commercial or malicious purposes. We expressly condone the use of this information for those purposes and use of information in that way violates our Terms of Use. By using Mailscoop, users acknowledge that they expressly accept all liability for the actions taken with the information Mailscoop provides. Resume Bullets Looking Good? Learn More Agency Partner Program FAQ How much does it cost to join the WP Engine Agency Partner Program? Our program is completely free to join! Why can’t I use my personal email (@gmail.com, @yahoo.com, etc) to apply? We require a business email that we can match to your website so we can create a unique user profile and ID. Do I need a website to apply to WP Engine’s Agency Partner Program? Yes, we require our partners to have active websites that display their services. Is this program the same as the WP Engine Affiliate program? No, this program is not the same as our Affiliate Program. This program is specifically for agencies who build or maintain websites for their clients. Our Affiliate Program is for those that recommend WP Engine, but do not have clients. Is there a certain amount of sites I need to refer in order to join the program? Nope! There is no site requirement in order to join. How do I know which tier I fall under? How do I move up the tiers? Every new partner starts off in the Member tier. As you refer more revenue you may move up the tiers. What is the Free Agency Partner hosting account (AKA “developer account”) that I have access to as part of the program? How do I use it? WP Engine agency partners receive free access to a hosting environment where they can host their agency website for free, explore platform features, demo WP Engine for clients, and access technical support. How do the Agency Partner Program commissions work? The commission structure and terms may vary depending on the agreement and terms between WP Engine and the agency partner. Additionally, WP Engine might have updated its commission structure or terms since then. In general, commission structures in agency partner programs can take several forms: One-Time Commission: Agencies may receive a one-time commission for each client they refer to WP Engine who signs up for a hosting plan. The commission is typically a percentage of the initial sale or a fixed amount. Recurring Commission: Some partner programs offer recurring commissions, where agencies earn a percentage of the revenue generated from the referred clients’ ongoing hosting fees. This type of commission is paid for the duration of the client’s subscription. Tiered Commission: WP Engine might have a tiered commission system based on the number of clients an agency refers or the total revenue generated from their referrals. As the agency refers more clients or generates higher revenue, they may qualify for higher commission rates. Performance-Based Commission: In some cases, commissions might be based on specific performance metrics, such as the number of sign-ups within a specific time frame or the overall sales volume generated by the agency’s referrals. Bonus or Incentive Programs: Some partner programs may include bonus or incentive programs, offering additional rewards for achieving certain milestones or meeting specific targets. Is there a minimum number of clients or accounts I need to have with WP Engine to be in the program? No, there is no minimum number of clients or accounts you need in order to join the program. Some agencies join the WP Engine Agency Partner Program with a large client list, others join just as they are starting their agency and use the relationship with WP Engine as part of their growth strategy. I’m an agency and have already been sending some clients to WPE and getting hosting myself, can I still join? How do I take advantage of the benefits? First of all, we’re so glad that you already trust your client’s success with WP Engine! Yes, you can definitely apply for the WP Engine Agency Partner Program at any time. When you join, speak to your partner manager about your existing clients on WP Engine so that we can help you take full advantage of the program benefits. How do I become a reseller of WP Engine’s managed hosting products for WordPress? WP Engine’s Agency Partner Program is a great place for agencies who want to partner with WP Engine to deliver great managed hosting experiences for WordPress. Agencies who want to resell hosting can join the APP and access discounted wholesale pricing, priority support from our team of experts in WordPress, co-marketing assets, as well as lead sharing. dogwifhat price Popcat (POPCAT) $0.428149 -13.15887 Popcat price Building the next-gen creator economy with AI agents | Opinion Feb 22, 2025 at 1:24 PM UTC Opinion Share Link copied Disclosure: The views and opinions expressed here belong solely to the author and do not represent the views and opinions of crypto.news’ editorial. The creator economy has seen explosive growth over the past decade, yet many content creators, writers, educators, and artists face a fundamental dilemma: monetization and content distribution often favor centralized platforms, which impose rigid rules, fees, and algorithms that limit creators’ autonomy and earnings.  You might also like: Creator economy 2.0: AI and web3 define the digital success | Opinion While web3 solutions promise greater freedom, they have thus far often had poor user experiences and required creators to navigate complex onboarding processes and applications. However, blockchain-based autonomous agents are emerging as a new alternative for creators, seamlessly handling tasks, sparking new creative possibilities, and finally putting creators back in control of their work and income. Creator assistants Autonomous agents simplify content distribution and monetization by automating tasks such as pricing, licensing, and revenue sharing, freeing creators to focus on their craft. For instance, these agents can optimize pricing strategies based on market demand or manage revenue splits transparently. Unlike traditional AI tools, decentralized agents can operate trustlessly onchain, ensuring transparency, reducing costs, and eliminating third-party intermediaries. By leveraging programmable rules and onchain verification, autonomous agents also allow creators to explore new revenue streams—such as micro-licensing or fractional ownership of digital assets—giving them control over their intellectual property while tapping into innovative monetization models. Ethical concerns, such as licensing and copyright issues, can be addressed through programmable licensing rights embedded in content metadata. Art curator agents In the digital art space, autonomous agents are already changing how content is curated, traded, and displayed. These agents can autonomously acquire and curate digital content based on predefined rules through onchain verification. By operating on a decentralized infrastructure, art curator agents reduce risks such as fraud or manipulation commonly associated with centralized platforms. Programmable licensing embedded in the metadata of digital art ensures all transactions respect the creator’s terms. This eliminates ambiguities around copyright and guarantees fair compensation for creators, even as their work circulates across different platforms. Intelligent creative tools Developers are integrating autonomous agents into creative applications, offering creators powerful tools to enhance their work. These agents can act as co-creators or intelligent managers to generate, refine, and manage content in new ways. For example, an agent embedded in a video editing platform might suggest edits based on audience engagement data or generate metadata to improve discoverability. The use of trustless, onchain computation means that creators are not reliant on centralized APIs or platforms, which could compromise their data or artistic vision. Unlike many current AI agents that depend on centralized APIs like OpenAI, these decentralized agents operate sustainably and transparently, avoiding vulnerabilities tied to centralized control. Where to start for creators For creators just starting to explore decentralized platforms, it is crucial to confirm that the platform they use provides reliable and sustainable storage for their data. Many traditional NFTs store the artwork and metadata separately, which can create issues if the centralized storage provider discontinues service or stops paying for the storage costs. That’s a recipe for future headaches. Decentralized platforms like Bazar take a different approach, bundling everything together—your work, its rights, and ownership—in one permanent transaction on Arweave, called an atomic asset. Think of it like a self-contained digital artwork that carries its own rule book, no matter where it travels online. This is especially important as AI increasingly interacts with creative work, making the ability to embed programmable licensing rights essential. To that end, Bazar is experimenting with a data licensing framework called the Universal Data License that empowers artists to encode clear usage rules directly into their creations. When art includes these clear rules about how it can be used, autonomous agents can act like digital rights managers, making sure terms are followed everywhere the work appears. These rules provide transparency for users and AI agents alike, ensuring consistent adherence to terms of use. It’s like having a tireless advocate ensuring creators maintain control over how their work is used, securing credit and compensation even as their art evolves and takes on new life across the digital landscape. The future of autonomous agents Over the next decade, autonomous agents will play an increasingly important role in the creator economy. By decentralizing content monetization and distribution, these agents reduce reliance on traditional platforms, providing creators with more tools and resources to maintain control over their work while streamlining business operations. They will also help identify new monetization strategies, intelligently manage distribution, and handle data-driven financial decisions.  Autonomous agents offer an opportunity for creators to regain control over their work and innovate in ways that would be previously constrained by centralized systems. As these tools evolve, they will help build a creator economy that prioritizes transparency, empowerment, and sustainable growth for all. Specialized tantric energy exercises that amplify and channel sexual and spiritual energy Advanced healing techniques that work at the quantum level Healing and energizing the womb or hara (the body's energy center) How to use crystals, pendulums, and tuning forks in your client sessions INTIMACY 20 hours Tantric polarity techniques to balance masculine and feminine energies Tantric intimacy and pleasure practices that enhance intimacy and pleasure The importance of intimacy and vulnerability in building trust and closeness in relationships The power of shadow work in your client sessions Tools to establish clear boundaries and consent practices The art of sacred touch techniques How to exchange and balance energy during intimate moments TRAUMA RELEASE 50 hours Effective emotional release methods to unlock stored emotions Therapeutic movement to reconnect with the body, release tension, and promote emotional well-being Body-based approaches to trauma healing with somatic experiencing techniques The energetic impact of trauma on the body The connection between the body and mind in trauma recovery for yourself and your clients Grounding practices to stabilize your clients after releasing traumatic energy THERAPIST SKILLS 80 hours Trauma informed care Providing a safe, sensitive and supportive care for individuals who have experienced trauma Skills for workshop facilitation on channeling Kundalini energy Techniques to facilitate the process of Tantric De-armouring Massage Leading tantric breathwork sessions Creating and facilitating tantric workshops that will enhance intimacy between couples The art of holding space, providing a compassionate and non-judgmental presence Techniques to protect your own energy and the energy of others during healing sessions The training is facilitated by Alexis Alcalá InnerCamp founder Master Trainer Meet Alexis Alcalá, the founder of InnerCamp and the visionary behind Holosomatic Therapy®. With over 12 years of experience in Breathwork, Bodywork, and Energy Activation, Alexis blends scientific knowledge with spiritual wisdom, making ancient healing practices accessible and relevant for modern times. His journey into somatic therapies began after years in the corporate world, where disconnection and health challenges pushed him to seek deeper healing. Traditional therapy and coaching provided insights, but they couldn’t fully address the root causes of his struggles. It was through somatic work that Alexis not only reconnected with his body but also transformed his life and found profound healing beyond what conventional medicine had offered. During this process, he trained with some of the most respected mentors in the field, deepening his understanding of the body-mind connection and developing his own approach to holistic healing. In 2018, after facilitating healing experiences for thousands worldwide, Alexis founded InnerCamp with a bold mission: to spread Holosomatic Therapy® across the globe. Since then, InnerCamp has trained over 2,000 therapists and impacted the lives of hundreds of thousands. Today, his focus is on expanding this movement, ensuring that Holosomatic Therapy® reaches communities worldwide and becomes a powerful tool for transformation and healing. Marjolein Van Ommeren Master Trainer Marjolein strongly believes that we are all healers, and her holistic approach is based on this foundation. Her mission is to help people raise their vibration and restore balance in their lives by reconnecting them to their inner light. Marjolein promotes the wisdom of the Womb/Hara Awakening, an ancient, self-empowering practice that is all about returning to the Western world’s awareness, helping people reconnect to their true purpose and align their lives. Joanna Radkowska Master Trainer Counselor Joanna’s background is working with survivors of abuse and exploitation in a trauma-informed way to help them rebuild their lives, increase feelings of safety and security within themselves and in their surroundings, and offer a space where their voices are heard. Joanna’s constant pursuit of knowledge has taken her on a student journey, starting with her studies in Psychology to various holistic and talking therapies such as Reiki, Alchemical Healing, Clinical Hypnotherapy, Yoga and Meditation, Breathwork and Pranayama, Tantra and Womb Healing. Joanna believes that offering kindness, compassion and practising self-love are crucial when healing from any life difficulties, and it is her focus during sessions with clients. Jordan Head Master Trainer Jordan has 17 years of experience working within the health and wellness industry as a Personal Trainer, Nutrition Coach, Master Practitioner of Neuro Linguistic Programming and Breathwork coach. Jordan is passionate about supporting others in removing what holds them back, and directing their energy towards a more fulfilling experience of life through their authentic selves. Learn to facilitate Kundalini Activation workshops, Tantric De-armoring massages, Tantric Breathwork workshops, and Healing Circles. Enjoy free access to InnerCamp virtual workshops and monthly mentoring calls. Earn a globally recognized diploma. Student facilitation sessions are included. Emotional support from a counselor is available to all students. Receive personalized feedback on assignments from an experienced trainer. Gain access to business tools. Flexible Learning Options. Choose between hybrid (in-person and online) or fully online training, both totaling 300 hours. Experience the best of both worlds with 5 days of in-person instruction complemented by 4 months of online coursework, or opt for our online program featuring weekly live sessions via Zoom. Globally Recognized Certification. Earn a diploma that is valid worldwide from an accredited training institution, ensuring you receive high-quality education and a respected certification upon completion. Rapid Career Development. Within just 4 months, you'll be equipped to organize workshops, sessions, and retreats. Tailored Therapeutic Skillset. Develop a unique therapeutic skill set that meets your individual needs. Our curated techniques eliminate the need for extensive searching, allowing you to focus on your growth and flexibility as a therapist. Holistic and Trauma-Informed Approach. Experience a comprehensive, trauma-informed, science-backed and embodied method that provides you with trusted and essential tools to support both yourself and your clients. Science-Backed Training Program. Our rigorous and effective curriculum blends the most pioneering and current science with holistic techniques to integrate and balance the mind, body, heart, and spirit. Extensive Hands-On Training. Engage in practical exercises designed to enhance your learning experience and deepen your skills. Exclusive Access to Resources. Enjoy free access to over 30 InnerCamp virtual workshops during your training, along with recordings for ongoing learning. Read more Dual Focus on Professional Development and Personal Growth. This program not only trains future therapists and facilitators but also fosters self-healing and personal growth, helping you recognise and heal your own wounds, discovering your true self, power, and gifts. User-Friendly Learning Platform. Access our modern app and e-learning platform to study conveniently on your laptop or mobile device. Global Reach. Join over 2,000 participants from 45 countries who have successfully completed the Holosomatic Therapy® training since 2018. Structured Session Planning. Eliminate the stress of session structuring with our tested, step-by-step method that you can implement immediately. Lifetime Monthly Mentorship. Benefit from ongoing emotional support, private counseling, and personalized feedback on assignments, helping you navigate the challenges that arise as you step into your higher purpose. Vibrant Global Community. Connect with a supportive community where you can share your journey, celebrate successes, and overcome challenges together. Our community provides the encouragement and reflection necessary for personal growth, including “study buddies” to support you throughout the course. Affiliate Program Benefits. Earn commissions for referring friends to InnerCamp and enjoy discounts on future experiences. Business Support and Visibility. Receive guidance on connecting with clients and marketing your sessions, along with a listing in the InnerCamp Facilitators Directory as a certified therapist/facilitator. Student Facilitation Sessions. This training includes both online and in-person facilitation sessions, providing students with hands-on experience to practice and refine their facilitation skills throughout the program. Book your spot Frequently asked questions What is InnerCamp? Founded in 2018 by Alexis Alcalá, InnerCamp is a nurturing training institution dedicated to holistic therapy and personal development. We believe in creating a supportive sanctuary for those seeking to explore beyond conventional practices and our diverse range of programs and workshops is designed to empower you to become a highly effective holistic therapist. At InnerCamp, we blend alternative healing methods with solid scientific and psychological foundations, ensuring that you receive a well-rounded education that explores healing from multiple angles. Our compassionate team, composed of 20 experienced educators with over 10 years of teaching in various disciplines, is committed to guiding you on your journey. We also have a dedicated Research Department focused on scientific investigations, ensuring our content remains at the leading-edge of scientific discovery. With more than 2,000 students from 45 countries having studied the various Holosomatic Therapy® techniques with us, we have established ourselves as a leader in holistic training. Our registered brands, Holosomatic Therapy® and Holosomatic®, reflect our commitment to excellence in the field. Our programs offer a range of specializations, including breathwork therapy, somatic bodywork therapy, energy healing, cacao ceremony, and tantra, available in both online and onsite formats. We are recognized for our transformative approach that seamlessly integrates ancient wisdom with modern techniques, helping you develop the skills needed to support others on their healing journeys. As an accredited school registered with the Complementary Medical Association and a member of the International Breathwork Foundation, InnerCamp is proud to provide CPD-certified training in Holosomatic Therapy®. Our dedication to holistic health has garnered us recognition as a leading provider in this field. At InnerCamp, our mission goes well beyond just training you. We aim to cultivate a vibrant community that inspires meaningful change in a world that so desperately needs it. Through our programs, not only will you gain valuable tools to help the lives of your clients, but you’ll develop methods for your own self-growth, trauma release, relationship harmonization — creating an inner and outer landscape that fosters self-love and consciousness expansion. Why should I join InnerCamp? - We have proven success, proudly training over 2,000 individuals on our courses over the last 5 years, empowering people just like you to make a positive impact through Energy Therapy. - Our Energy Therapy training program, available both online and in-person, offers an extensive 300-hour course designed to equip you with the knowledge and skills necessary for effective practice. You will delve into the healing power of Kundalini Activation, Energy Healing, Tantric Tantric Breathwork, De-armouring Massage, Tantric Intimacy, Trauma Release, and learn Therapist Success Strategies to empower you as you take your practice into the world. - We offer the expertise you need to thrive as a holistic therapist and make a lasting and meaningful impact in the lives of others. Whether you prefer the flexibility of online learning or the immersive experience of in-person training, our programs are designed to meet your needs wherever you are in the world. - InnerCamp courses benefit from globally recognised accreditation by three respected international organizations, ensuring that you receive a high-quality education that meets global standards. - Our dedicated and experienced trainers bring over 10 years of experience in working with clients and therapists from all over the world, offering you invaluable insights and support throughout your learning journey and beyond. - We focus on healing, not gurus. At InnerCamp, we prioritize the healing and transformation of individuals and communities over the idea of guru status. Your growth as a therapist is what truly matters to us and we do everything we can to help you become the most proficient and effective Holistic Therapist. - We provide a trauma-informed approach to ensure that you are able to support your clients safely and effectively, preventing any harm and fostering a deep sense of trust and genuine healing. Which Kundalini Activation technique/s exactly are you using in this program? It’s well known that many people experience challenges during Kundalini activation sessions, which can sometimes lead to trauma or illness. Our program, however, offers a holistic and therapeutic approach that prioritizes the safety and well-being of you and your future clients. Rather than simply activating Kundalini energy or pursuing unfocused catharsis, we focus on the mindful activation of energy that respects the body's readiness for Kundalini activation techniques. Our comprehensive and compassionate methodology addresses any potential blockages which can be worked through to prevent traumatic experiences. We use a range of techniques to create a balanced and supportive experience in preparation for Kundalini activation, including: - Energy Field Activation - Chakra Balancing - Breathwork - Meditation and Visualization - Neuroscience Principles - Somatic Techniques - Bandhas Work - Tantric Practices - Accessing Non-Ordinary States of Consciousness Our program is designed to safely and effectively prepare the body, alleviate blockages, and promote overall well-being while safely guiding participants through the profound journey of Kundalini awakening. What’s the difference between online and in-person training? In-Person: Our in-person courses include an intensive 5-day in-person training where you will engage in transformative practices to connect with your intuition and activate your energy. By the end of this immersive experience, you will be equipped to facilitate some of the most powerful energy healing techniques developed with scientific backing. Following this training, you will begin a 4-month online course (260 hours), which you can complete at your own pace within 6 months. While there are no live Zoom sessions, you will have access to monthly mentoring calls and all of InnerCamp’s virtual workshops. Upon successful completion, you will receive your InnerCamp Tantra Energy Activation Therapist Diploma. Online: In the online training program, you will participate in 18 live Zoom sessions (2.5 hours each) focused on intuitive connection and energy activation. This course also includes a 3-month online curriculum totaling 300 hours. Similar to the in-person program, it is designed to be completed within 4 months, with an extension of up to 6 months if you need more time. You will have access to monthly mentoring calls and all virtual workshops. After completing all course requirements, you will receive your InnerCamp Tantra Energy Activation Therapist Diploma. Which Holosomatic Therapy® Training should I take, Breath, Body, or Energy? If you are new to learning or offering healing practices, we recommend you begin your journey with Holosomatic Breath Therapy®. This is our foundational program and allows you to experience, embody, and master essential skills in inner connection, emotional regulation, and focused attention. For those who already possess a solid foundation and are seeking to deepen their understanding of bodily experiences and heal deeper layers of trauma, Holosomatic Body Therapy® is the ideal choice to take your kills to the next level. This program emphasizes bodywork techniques that facilitate the release of old traumas stored in the body, helping to alleviate tissue numbness and allowing your system to safely open up to more subtle vibrational frequencies—preparing you for higher levels of energetic activation and movement. Once you have established this essential groundwork, you may find that Holosomatic Energy Therapy® aligns best with your growth processes, both personally and in your Holistic Therapy practices with clients, enabling you to explore advanced energetic activation and movement. If I had the training a few years ago, would you recommend me to take it again? Is there a difference between the previous InnerCamp Tantra training and the Holosomatic ENERGY Therapy Training? The Holosomatic Energy Therapy® Training features a new and distinct curriculum that differs significantly from our previous Tantra courses, with only about 20% overlap. This innovative program focuses on the six foundational elements: Kundalini Activation, Energy Healing, Tantric De-armouring Massage, Tantric Breathwork, Tantric Intimacy, and Trauma Release Techniques. If you’re interested in enhancing your skills and deepening your journey with us, we’d be delighted to have you enroll in this transformative training. And, if you’ve been on the previous training we’ll be happy to offer a special discount for returning participants. It will be wonderful to see you again! What does this training include? - Expert guidance from senior teachers with online or in-person class options - Lifetime access to the online course, including all the videos and exclusive reading materials. - Structured learning with weekly tasks and personalized advice designed to enhance your skills. - Participate in all of InnerCamp’s virtual workshops for four months. - Benefit from exclusive discounts on additional InnerCamp experiences, courses, and events. - Access curated playlists to enhance your personal journey and your practice with clients. - Utilize our fully customizable templates for your sessions and events promotions. - Receive ongoing support with lifetime access to monthly mentoring calls and study partner meetings. - Connect with a vibrant, global community of Holistic Therapists just like you. - Earn an internationally recognized Diploma to facilitate sessions using the InnerCamp Tantra Method. - Get listed in the InnerCamp Facilitators Directory to enhance your professional visibility. - Free 1-on-1 session with the InnerCamp counsellor. Can I move at my own pace through the course? Yes, you can take your time with the course material. We understand that everyone learns at a different pace and sometimes moving slower can help you to retain the information better. However, it is important to be aware that this course requires you to attend live sessions in order to stay on track. This will ensure that you don’t fall behind and also allows you to interact with the instructors and other students in the course. Is there any deadline? After the program has officially ended, you have up to 3 months to complete the course on our platform in order to receive your certification. This is the final extension for the completion of the program. Does the training include examination? Yes, each level of our training comes with a final exam. The purpose of this examination is to ensure you are able to recognise, recall and show understanding what you have learned. The exam also covers your ability to select, organize and communicate relevant information in a variety of forms present and organize material clearly, use relevant terminology, and apply your knowledge and skill set to real-life situations. Are the assignments mandatory? Yes, assignments are a key part of the learning experience. They’re crafted to help you deepen your understanding of the theories, concepts, and methods we cover during your course of study. While they are mandatory, they are also an opportunity for personal growth and self-discovery, allowing you to gain valuable insights into yourself and how you relate to the material. We believe these assignments will enrich your journey and support you in becoming more connected with your own learning process. If I booked the online training, should I turn my camera on during live sessions? Yes, we ask that you keep your camera on during live sessions to ensure active participation and engagement. This helps create a connected and focused learning environment between you, your instructors, and other students on the course. If you have any challenges with attendance due to work or other commitments, please let us know in advance, and we’ll do our best to accommodate you. Your presence and visibility are important to us and enhance the overall learning experience. How does the pricing work? We have three payment options available: 1. Full payment upfront: Paying the entire amount for the training program in a single payment at the time of registration. 2. Deposit payment: This option requires customers to pay a deposit of 500 euros to secure their spot in the training program. The remainder of the balance is then due 2 weeks (for online programs) or 1 month (for onsite/hybrid programs) prior to the start date of the program. 3. Installment payments: This option allows customers to spread the cost of the training program over several months. The payment plan involves paying the total cost of the program in equal installments, with each payment charged monthly from the customer's card. My training program has not started yet but can I cancel and get a refund? Yes, you can cancel your program before it starts. Refunds depend on the cancellation date and program type, as outlined in our Cancellation Policy. We offer flexible terms, including full or partial refunds or credit for future bookings. For details, please review our Terms of Service at https://innercamp.com/terms/, Chapter 8. My training program has started but can I cancel and get a refund? Whilst we do understand that circumstances can change, and we’re here to help you when something arises, refunds are not available once the training program has started. However, you can transfer your enrollment to a future program for a fee of 300 EUR plus any price difference. Alternatively, in certain situations, we may be able to offer you credit toward a future program with InnerCamp. Please refer to our Cancellation and Refund Policy for more details at this link https://innercamp.com/terms/, Chapter 8. My training program has finished but I didn't participate; can I get a refund? We understand that sometimes things don’t always go as planned. If the program you booked onto has finished and you were unable to participate, a refund isn’t available. However, you can transfer your spot to a future session within three months for a 600 EUR admin fee plus any price difference. If you need to transfer after this period, you’ll need to pay the full current price for the new session. For more details, please check our Terms of Service at https://innercamp.com/terms/, Chapter 8. How much effort is required per week? For our online courses, we recommend approximately 10 hours per week of dedicated time, which includes the Zoom sessions. For the in-person courses, in addition to the face-to-face contact hours, we recommend an extra 6 hours per week. To make the most of your time at Innercamp, we also suggest you participate in our other community activities. If I booked the online training, should I attend all live sessions? It’s best to attend all live sessions, yes. At Inercamp we require a minimum attendance of 75% for the required live sessions of the course for Level 1 and 100% for Level 2. It would be best to make sure you are able to join in with all the scheduled dates when you book onto the course. What are the certification requirements? To be eligible for the Therapist Diploma, please ensure you meet the following requirements: ONLINE TRAINING - Maintain a minimum attendance rate of 75% for the live sessions. - Successfully complete the course on our e-learning platform and obtain approval for all assignments from the InnerCamp team - Keep the camera on in the live sessions and actively participate in the class and the practices. - Facilitate live in all students facilitating sessions according to the requirements of your course. IN-PERSON TRAINING - Join the in-person training and actively participate in all course activities - Successfully complete the online course on our e-learning platform and obtain approval for all assignments from the InnerCamp team. We encourage you to stay committed and engaged as you progress through your chosen program. Completing the course and earning your certification is a testament to your dedication and achievement. What if I cannot keep up with my current course, can I move my spot to the next edition and start over? We understand that sometimes life can get in the way of our educational pursuits and that it can be difficult to keep up with course requirements in some circumstances. If the program has started already and you’d like to move your spot to the next edition, you can do so for an additional fee of 300 EUR plus the price difference if any, in accordance with our Terms of Service. Section 8, Cancellation and Refund Policy. Who is a study buddy? Upon enrollment, all students are matched with a study buddy to support them on their journey. A study buddy is an online partner you study alongside with, offering each other mutual support, discussing concepts and working together on assignments. What happens if I fail the assignments? If you fail, don’t worry! You can retake the assignments as many times as you need at no additional cost. To make sure you are well prepared, please handle each module’s assignments seriously, revise your notes, and study all materials on our e-learning platform. Will I continue to have access to the course even after I complete it? Yes, you will have a lifetime access to the course. So, if you wish to review a specific topic from the course after you finish it, or take it all over again, you can. Will I be able to run workshops and retreats after I am certified? Yes, our goal at InnerCamp is to enhance your learning by integrating theory and practice. We will not only teach you how to run events, including all those considerations you may not have thought of, but will also provide opportunities to collaborate with InnerCamp. Our recent graduates have been facilitating online events to put their newly acquired skills into work straight away. Will I become a trauma-informed therapist with this training? Yes, by participating in our training, you will be equipped to become a trauma-informed therapist. This program is designed to provide you with the knowledge and skills necessary to support clients dealing with a wide range of traumatic experiences, including PTSD, CPTSD, panic attacks, and sexual abuse. Throughout the training, you will delve into the theory of trauma, exploring both the psychological and physiological impacts. Moreover, you will learn practical strategies for working with clients who have experienced trauma, ensuring that your approach is sensitive, effective, and geared towards fostering resilience and healing. pageText (crawler): Beyond Connections | Build a World-Class Network Overview Process Outcomes Instructors Curriculum From the Author of New York Times #1 Bestseller "Never Eat Alone" Join the Live, Cohort-Based Networking Training & Community for Professionals Beyond Connections is an exclusive 8-week program that helps you close more deals, switch careers, raise capital, land promotions, and unlock endless opportunities through the power of relationships. Apply to Beyond Connections Enrolling now for the July cohort | Limited spots available As Featured On “Keith and his team were remarkable coaches.” Vishen Lakhiani Founder & CEO, Mindvalley “Ferrazzi is breaking new ground in defining what leadership can mean in the emerging world of work.” Arianna Huffington Founder and CEO, Thrive Global Professionals, Entrepreneurs & Executives If you’re not already amazing at building relationships with the right people, you could be missing out on high-value clients, job offers, partnerships and real business growth. Have you ever watched someone less qualified get the promotion, funding, or partnership, just because they had the right connections? Are you doing all the right things but your career growth is stagnant ? Do you keep missing opportunities, and wondering why the right people aren’t noticing you ? Are you lacking a system for growing your network effectively? Here's the truth no one tells you: The most successful people aren't necessarily the most talented. They're the most connected. ‍ ‍ And if you don't have the right people in your corner, it's costing you — more than you realize. Without the right network... You'll stay invisible to the people who can open doors for you . The best opportunities go to those who stand out and make an impression (not the most talented). Being good at networking isn’t enough. In today’s market, you’ve got to be a master at the art of relationships. You burn out faster — without a tribe to lean on, the pressure is always on to figure everything out solo and work through challenges on your own. You’ll waste time on surface-level conversations that go nowhere. Collecting business cards. Sending cold DMs. Hoping for referrals that never come. None of it moves the needle if you don't have a strategy. Your growth will plateau. Whether it's hitting a revenue ceiling, feeling stuck in the same job, or struggling to get a new venture off the ground… not having the right connections will leave you at a disadvantage vis a vis the competition. But When You Use a Proven System to Master Networking? Everything Changes. Opportunities find you. The right people start reaching out-offering collaborations, clients, and career opportunities you didn't even know existed. Referrals become the norm. Without even asking, new deals come your way. People do business with people they like and have strong rapport with. You future-proof your career — no matter the industry shift, or how much AI takes over, relationship soft skills always pay dividends. Your business, and influence grow exponentially. When you build a network of high-value relationships, you all lift each other up faster. And networking isn't about being naturally charismatic or knowing the right people from birth. It's a skill - a repeatable system you can learn. And that's exactly what we'll help you with in Beyond Connections. Apply to Beyond Connections Building social capital isn't luck, it's a formula. We'll Show You How. Our #1 New York Times bestsellers on relationships & networks have changed lives all over the world. What is Beyond Connections? Beyond Connections is a live, online, practice based training experience for professionals who want to master the art of relationships. Apply to Beyond Connections Social capital refers to the invisible currency that lives in all of your relationship s - past, present, and future. You build it by consistently bringing depth and authenticity into your relationships while leading with generosity. Maximizing social capital means going beyond who you know to how well you leverage your relationships across all walks of life. How Does It Work? Over the past two decades, we've studied networks, effective leaders and high performing teams to develop a system focused on maximizing social capital. 1. Learn the System Master the mindsets and winning strategies, and design a system that’s customized for who you are and where you’re heading. 2. Practice with Coaches & Community You only get better with practice. Implement what you’re learning within a community of professionals who have each other’s backs. Work with program coaches for personalized guidance, feedback, and accountability. 3. Expand Your Network While learning together, you’ll have regular opportunities to build deep, lasting relationships with 300+ vetted professionals like you from over 30 countries. “Keith grabs your attention immediately and takes you on a ride that transforms your life to be more honest, open and of service to others.” Peter Diamandis Founder, Singularity University Your network IS your net worth. So, what happens when you master the art of networking? In just eight weeks, Beyond Connections graduates raise the bar with their accomplishments. And we know you can do the same… Convert 3+ high-value contacts to your inner circle in the next 60 days Whether it’s potential clients, investors, mentors, or business partners, you’ll turn at least a few new contacts into meaningful relationships where you have each other’s backs. Walk into any event or meeting with confidence No more small talk that goes nowhere. You’ll know how to make an impression, build trust fast, and turn casual conversations into valuable relationships. ‍ Master the follow up game Because the magic isn’t just in meeting people — it’s in staying top-of-mind, deepening connections, and becoming the person others want to introduce to their network. Level up the way you’re perceived Whether connecting in real-life or online, your story and the way you present yourself will change significantly. ‍ If you’re ready to stop watching others land the best opportunities... Apply to Beyond Connections INSTRUCTORS Meet the Team Keith Ferrazzi Chairman , Ferrazzi Greenlight Author , Never Eat Alone & Who's Got Your Back Keith Ferrazzi is the Chairman of Ferrazzi Greenlight and recognized global thought leader in the relational and collaborative sciences. Formerly he was the CMO of Deloitte and Starwood Hotels. He is a #1 New York Times best-selling author of Who’s Got Your Back and Never Eat Alone and his newest book Leading Without Authority, as well as a frequent contributor to Harvard Business Review, WSJ, Fast Company, Forbes, Inc, Fortune and other publications. Ronen Olshansky CEO , Connected Success Partner , Ferrazzi Greenlight Ronen Olshansky is a Partner at Ferrazzi Greenlight, where he coaches CEO’s and leadership teams of fast-growth private companies. Prior to coaching, Ronen was the founder & CEO of Cross Campus, a Los Angeles based shared office and event hosting business that operated seven locations for over 5,000 members at its pre-pandemic peak. Ronen’s career was focused primarily in finance & consulting at firms including JPMorganChase, Lehman Brothers and Arthur Andersen. Ronen studied Economics at Yale with coursework at London School of Economics. “Hands down the leading body of relational and collaborative insights to drive growth.” Andy Sieg Head of Wealth, Citi Former President, Merrill Lynch “Keith is at the forefront of understanding relationships as a technology for success.” Seth Godin Founder altMBA New York Times Bestselling Author CONTENT The Beyond Connections Framework MODULE 1 Cultivating a Relational Mindset Shift from a short-term transactional to a long-term, relational mindset Unlock the power of GVA (generosity, vulnerability, and authenticity) Get past common myths & limiting beliefs that are holding you back MODULE 2 Share Your Story Reimagine your personal story, making it memorable and adaptable to different scenarios Elevate your LinkedIn presence Improve how you show up, in person and on camera MODULE 3 From Networking to Community Building Understand the mindset shift from building a network to putting yourself at the center of communities A playbook for hosting unforgettable bonding dinners A playbook for hosting engaging online insights sessions MODULE 4 The Beyond Connections System Managing relationship data easily so that you can always stay in the zone Effective pre-call and post-call routines to maximize efficiency Staying on track using calendar strategies MODULE 5 Rekindling & Tracking Connections Be top of mind to those who matter by staying on top of follow-up How to search your history for valuable relationships that slipped through the cracks Strategies for reaching back out without seeming transactional MODULE 6 Conversations for Connection Become a “supercommunicator” that reliably builds depth in any conversation Mirroring techniques to build connection Use LinkedIn strategically to engage your network MODULE 7 Giving & Receiving Overcoming fear and resistance in asking for help Make your asks in a way that lands with results Balance giving and getting in relationships MODULE 8 Mastering Events Maximize ROI from your time at conferences & events Pre-conference checklist & game-time strategies The “deep bump” technique to get the most out of a 5 minutes interaction How to remember names We've Worked With RESULTS Over 8-Weeks, Participants Experienced 85% increase in effectiveness using networking tools, systems and practices 57% increase in relationship building mindsets and strategies 41% increase in scale and quality of network 16% increase in confidence interacting with people in person 36% increase in confidence interacting with people online And they have gone on to... Land their dream jobs Raise money for new ventures Make lifelong friendships Sell out their events Cofound companies together Plan shared adventure trips Get unexpected offers - like judging the largest global hackathon for NASA! TESTIMONIALS What Others Are Saying About Our Work “Never Eat Alone is one of the books that has had a bigger impact on my life and the one I have recommended the most – especially younger folks in the first years of their corporate careers at P&G and other companies.” Alberto Moriana Former P&G Senior Vice President “Could not be more a more timely topic, Keith…..we need connection now more than ever to find common ground, purpose and meaning in our world…can’t wait to hear more.” Judy Zagorski CHRO of UGI Corporation “Keith, I read your book in 2022 after seeing you speak at the HBS reunion. Loved everything about it and it stuck with me. Fast forward to 2023... I intentionally reached out to all those people in my life I had lost touch with over the years... and had the most phenomenal month. Next time I’m in NY, I’ll have so many reinvigorated relationships to connect with.” Julie Schechtman Managing Director at Morgan Stanley “Love this book. Mostly, because of the authentic approach to networking, asking for help, advice - making it “OK” to help each other and more importantly, thrive together. Thanks for many years of great insights.” Stephanie Anderson Group Vice President at Spectrum “I didn’t realize it’s been that long, but I’ve been recommending it for nearly 20 years. Mindset shift and preparing for events were the pivotal points for me, but every point you listed stands the test of time.” Tony Coles President, Multicultural Business& Development at iHeartMedia “This book changed my life and I reread it every few years. Most business books I’ve come across have 2 or 3 key ideas and the rest is filler, but this one has insight in basically every paragraph.” Ryan Hinley Veteran Outreach Program Specialist at U.S. Department of Veteran Affairs The Best Opportunities Don’t Always Go to the Most Qualified – They Go to the Best Connected Look around at the workplace today… successful colleagues, friends who run businesses, Thought Leaders online… So many get their “big break” from a warm introduction. The right person lifted them up which catalyzed their momentum. Even if they might be less qualified or experienced than you. Others land clients with ease. Get funding. Regular promotions. Speak on larger and larger stages. All through their network. Here's the hard truth: Success isn't just about talent. It's about who knows you, trusts you, and wants to open doors for you. And right now, you're doing it the hard way - trying to figure out networking on your own, hoping the right opportunities will find you. Relying on people you went to school with, people you've worked with, played sports with or family friends. But networking isn't luck. It's a skill. And once you learn it, you'll never feel like an outsider again. You deserve to be recognized in your industry. You deserve a thriving business with leads continuously flowing your way. You deserve a network that lifts you up instead of holding you back. You deserve to stop playing small and start getting the opportunities that match your talent. It's time to take control of your network - and your future. Apply to Beyond Connections today. Take the Next Step in Building Your Dream Network Apply to Beyond Connections Connected Success | 2025 Privacy Policy Refund Policy Reviews

Can I use Books.by in addition to Amazon? Yes. If your book is already published with Amazon or another self-publisher, it is possible to also publish it with Books.by. How much will I earn on my book? You earn 100% of the sales proceeds after deducting the book printing and shipping costs. We show you a breakdown of costs when you select your retail price, so that you can forecast your earnings. The average Books.by author receives a 38% royalty. What book sizes do you offer? This allows us to invest in building more tools for authors, while affording you the margins to sell more books. What countries is Books.by available in? Books.by is available in the USA, Canada, the UK, Australia, New Zealand, and Europe. We have printing facilities all around the world (predominantly in the USA, Europe, UK and Australia), with international shipping options to provide global sales coverage. Web Designer Creative Coach Breathwork Coach Personal Brand Expert Brand + Web Designer Pattern Cutting & Sampling Ethical Manufacturing Consultant Diversity Consultant & Artist Messaging Expert Copy Strategist What are micro-communities, and how do they work? Micro-communities are smaller groups within the membership, led by experts in specific fields like business strategy, creativity, or lifestyle. They allow for deeper connections, tailored support, and focused learning. The micro-communities are fully stand alone and hosted by external creatives, the Club acts as the host so you can access multiple spaces in one place. Is it right for me? If you’re a creative founder looking to connect with like-minded people, get real-world knowledge (in business & living), stay focused and gain clarity on your business goals, this membership is the perfect fit—whether you’re just starting out or already established. You’re also looking to get all that support and access multiple exclusive communities – all under one roof so you don’t have to go everywhere to find what you need. Do I need to commit to a long-term plan? Not at all! You simple pay a £37 admin fee per year, this gives you full, flexible access to everything the community offers without a monthly commitment. This admin fee is auto renewed annually – you can cancel anytime and your membership will end once your year has ended. What if I don’t have much time to engage? Obviously, we’d love to have you involved as possible, and you will see the most impact if you get involved in the communities you join inside the Club. But, we’ve designed the membership to be flexible. Whether you join live sessions, dip into the community when needed, or use our on-demand resources, you’ll still gain value in a way that fits your schedule. Can I collaborate with other members? Absolutely! Collaboration is at the heart of our community. Many members find partners, clients, and collaborators through connections made here. Are there additional costs beyond the annual admin fee? Your annual admin fee give your an annual membership that covers the core community and many features, but there are optional paid resources like courses and advanced tools if you want to dive deeper into specific topics. Can I cancel my membership? Yes, you can cancel anytime, and your access will remain active until the end of your subscription period. are optional paid resources like courses and advanced tools if you want to dive deeper into specific topics. We help you secure organic media coverage - no paid placements here. Do I need to do anything? No - just sit back and we’ll deliver the links. Where can I read reviews of your service? We’d rather show you than tell you! We’re proud of our Excellent rating on TrustPilot. Check out our recent reviews on Trustpilot . How do I know when I have a link? We provide real-time media monitoring, so you’ll receive instant notifications when we secure you each link. How long does it take to see results? Link building is a long-term SEO strategy, and results depend on factors like your industry, competition, and existing domain authority. Most clients see an improvement in organic traffic, search rankings, and domain authority within 3 to 6 months , but high-quality backlinks continue to add value over time What kind of sites do you get links from? We secure high-authority, relevant, and trustworthy websites across a variety of industries, including news publications, niche blogs, and authoritative online magazines. Our focus is on editorial backlinks , meaning your links come from real, high-quality content on reputable sites . Can I review the pitch before you submit it? We don’t offer pre-approval of pitches. Speed is key in PR—journalists receive a flood of pitches, and we want yours to be among the first they see. That said, we always focus on securing high-quality, relevant backlinks from authoritative sites in your industry. Our approach ensures natural, editorial links that provide long-term SEO value and credibility. Can I choose my anchor text? No, sorry. Journalists decide on the anchor text themselves. In most cases, they’ll use a branded anchor (your business name or personal name). Why does it take a few weeks to land the first link? Can we speed it up? We start pitching right away, but journalists work on their own schedules, and some sites have longer editorial processes. While we aim to secure placements as quickly as possible, the timeline is ultimately in their hands. That said, sometimes links land sooner—but we can’t guarantee it. Do you have a minimum DR for billable links? Yes, we guarantee a minimum Average Domain Rating (DR) of 70. Are these Do Follow or No Follow links? These links include a mix of Follow and No Follow (nofollow) links — and we charge for both, because both are genuinely high-value . While dofollow links are often seen as more desirable, Google now treats nofollow as a “hint” , not a rule — meaning even nofollow links can still pass value, especially when they come from trusted editorial media sources . Our placements appear in real articles on sites like Forbes, USA Today, The Sun, and Business Insider , which Google already views as credible and authoritative. It’s important to note: these are not sponsored or guest post links , which provide little SEO benefit and increasingly come with risk. Sponsored and guest post links should be marked as "sponsored", which Google treats just like "nofollow" — but many sites fail to disclose them properly. When that happens, Google may penalise the linking site and the one being linked to , damaging your domain’s authority. Our links, by contrast, are earned through editorial inclusion — not payment for placement. They’re safe, natural, and exactly the kind of link Google rewards over time. 👉 That’s why top SEO agencies across the US, UK, and Canada white-label our media link service for their own clients . These links are in high demand — because they’re credible, effective, and safe . Do syndicated links count toward my order? Syndicated articles with links: We’ll count one link (regardless of dofollow or nofollow) from syndicated content toward your order. Any additional versions will only count if they are dofollow . Can I build links to specific pages? Most links will point to your homepage—that’s typically how journalists link when quoting sources. Can I white label this service? Yes - we can white label this service. Here are some frequently asked questions. Is Editorielle right for me? Editorielle is right for anyone who wants to get featured in the press! ‍ Forget spending lots of £££, we’ll connect you with journalists from just £10/month. ‍ We’re so confident in our ability that we have no contracts & no minimum term. ‍ You can cancel at any time! How does Editorielle work? Every weekday, the Editorielle newsletter will arrive in your inbox at 12pm UK time. ‍ This includes requests from journalists at top-tier publications such as Forbes, Grazia, GQ, Cosmopolitan & many more who are looking for businesses, products, experts & services (just like yours!) to feature in their articles. ‍ If you see an opportunity that catches your eye & you’d like to contact the journalist, simply press 'click to pitch'. Then, simply write why you think you’re the perfect fit & hit send! ‍ Your email will land directly in the journalist's inbox. If they like your pitch, they'll reply directly to your inbox & you can liaise with them further. ‍ That's it, it really is that simple! What are Instant Categories? Instant categories can boost your chances of press success! Receive notifications the minute a new opportunity arises, allowing for faster responses & even better results. ‍ When signing up, you'll choose which of our 12 press categories you'd like to receive round-the-clock alerts for. You'll then receive these straight to your inbox, as soon as we approve them. ‍ This will give you a head-start to craft the perfect pitch before anyone else! How is Editorielle so affordable? Our goal is to make press coverage accessible for all! ‍ We don’t think it should only be for those with deep pockets. So forget spending lots of money, we’ll help you get press from just £10/month. ‍ We’re proud to be doing things differently & that means: ‍ ✘ No contracts ✘ No minimum term ✘ No risk, you can cancel at any time! How do I reply to a journalist? If you see a press opportunity that catches your eye, simply press the ‘click to pitch’ button. ‍ Then, simply write why you think you or your business is the perfect fit & hit send! ‍ Here are our top 5 tips when replying to journalists! ‍ Tip 1 - Be Quick! The clock is ticking! Journalist requests are time-sensitive so try to pitch as soon as possible. ‍ Tip 2 - Stay Relevant! Think quality over quantity. You don’t need to respond to every request! Pay close attention to whether you meet the journalists’ criteria & whether their publication meets yours. ‍ Tip 3 - Keep Your Pitch Short & Sweet! A perfect pitch should be short, informative & to-the-point. No fluff or unnecessary jargon! ‍ Tip 4 - Include All Info! Make sure you include all details that the journalist requested. ‍ Did they ask a question? Answer it! Did they request an image? Attach it! ‍ Most importantly, remember to include important details, which dependent on you, may include: ‍ ✓ Full name ✓ Your position ✓ Company name ✓ Link to your website ✓ Pricing & stockist details ‍ Tip 5 - Proofread! Journalists are looking for accurate information that they can use in their articles, so make your replies publication-ready. Before you hit send, double check for typos! Do I have to pay journalists to get featured? No! The journalists we work with are always on the lookout for exciting products, expert commentary, businesses & services to fill their articles. ‍ If you fit their brief, they will write about you for free. ‍ In the PR world this is called editorial (free) coverage as opposed to advertorial (paid) coverage. Is there a minimum term I must sign up for? No! We are so confident in our ability & service that there is no minimum term. ‍ If it’s not right for you, you can cancel at any time! I would highly recommend.” —Max, Classic Interiors Still Have Questions? We’ve Got You Is there any eligibility criteria? Yes, you’ll need to be ‘PR-ready’: Well-optimised website. A spokesperson we can use for expert comments. Be open-minded about content. Have the budget and patience (it takes a few months to deliver links). When chatting with our team on our initial discovery call we’ll establish whether we’re the right fit for each other. After our call, if we think we can help, we'll send you a proposal with a plan for your brand and next steps. How do I sign up? Book in chat and if we think we’d be a good fit for each other, we’ll create a plan for you and share a link for you to sign-up. Are there any extra costs? Nothing at all! We help you secure organic media coverage - no paid placements here. Do I need to do anything? No - just sit back and we’ll deliver the links. Where can I read reviews of your service? We’d rather show you than tell you! We’re proud of our Excellent rating on TrustPilot. Check out our recent reviews on Trustpilot . How do I know when I have a link? We provide real-time media monitoring, so you’ll receive instant notifications when we secure you each link. How long does it take to see results? Link building is a long-term SEO strategy, and results depend on factors like your industry, competition, and existing domain authority. Most clients see an improvement in organic traffic, search rankings, and domain authority within 3 to 6 months , but high-quality backlinks continue to add value over time What kind of sites do you get links from? We secure high-authority, relevant, and trustworthy websites across a variety of industries, including news publications, niche blogs, and authoritative online magazines. Our focus is on editorial backlinks , meaning your links come from real, high-quality content on reputable sites . Can I review the pitch before you submit it? We don’t offer pre-approval of pitches. Speed is key in PR—journalists receive a flood of pitches, and we want yours to be among the first they see. That said, we always focus on securing high-quality, relevant backlinks from authoritative sites in your industry. Our approach ensures natural, editorial links that provide long-term SEO value and credibility. Can I choose my anchor text? No, sorry. Journalists decide on the anchor text themselves. In most cases, they’ll use a branded anchor (your business name or personal name). Why does it take a few weeks to land the first link? Can we speed it up? We start pitching right away, but journalists work on their own schedules, and some sites have longer editorial processes. While we aim to secure placements as quickly as possible, the timeline is ultimately in their hands. That said, sometimes links land sooner—but we can’t guarantee it. Do you have a minimum DR for billable links? Yes, we guarantee a minimum Average Domain Rating (DR) of 70. Are these Do Follow or No Follow links? These links include a mix of Follow and No Follow (nofollow) links — and we charge for both, because both are genuinely high-value . While dofollow links are often seen as more desirable, Google now treats nofollow as a “hint” , not a rule — meaning even nofollow links can still pass value, especially when they come from trusted editorial media sources . Our placements appear in real articles on sites like Forbes, USA Today, The Sun, and Business Insider , which Google already views as credible and authoritative. It’s important to note: these are not sponsored or guest post links , which provide little SEO benefit and increasingly come with risk. Sponsored and guest post links should be marked as "sponsored", which Google treats just like "nofollow" — but many sites fail to disclose them properly. When that happens, Google may penalise the linking site and the one being linked to , damaging your domain’s authority. Our links, by contrast, are earned through editorial inclusion — not payment for placement. They’re safe, natural, and exactly the kind of link Google rewards over time. 👉 That’s why top SEO agencies across the US, UK, and Canada white-label our media link service for their own clients . These links are in high demand — because they’re credible, effective, and safe . Do syndicated links count toward my order? Syndicated articles with links: We’ll count one link (regardless of dofollow or nofollow) from syndicated content toward your order. Any additional versions will only count if they are dofollow . Can I build links to specific pages? Most links will point to your homepage—that’s typically how journalists link when quoting sources. Can I white label this service? Yes - we can white label this service.
