In short, nope! Our visuals are strictly for promoting, not reselling. So, feel free to use them to jazz up your product promotions or mock-ups, but please don’t include them in products for sale—whether it’s T-shirts, mugs, or even bath towels. Got questions? Just give us a shout, and we’ll help sort things out! ‍ Why does my brand need DTS? Let's cut to the chase. The digital landscape? It's crowded and noisy. Standing out? Tougher than ever. But here's the thing: trends. They're game-changers. Our trend researchers and hunters pinpoint these goldmines, allowing us to produce content that's dialed into what's hot. The result? Your brand doesn't just blend in; it stands out and resonates deeply with your audience. That's the DTS edge. With us, navigating the cultural waves becomes a breeze, giving your brand the competitive edge it deserves What can I do with DTS visuals? You've got a lot of options! Think about giving your website a fresh look. Want a standout post on social media? You can do that. Running paid ads? No problem. For all your basic marketing and promotions, you're covered. And if you're feeling a bit bold, consider a TV commercial or outdoor advertising with an extended license. You have the freedom to choose. What can I NOT do with DTS visuals? Alright, let's chat about what you can't do with DTS visuals. Even though we give you a lot of creative freedom, there are a few no-nos: ‍ Don't claim our work as your own. That's just not cool. Our models can't endorse your products directly. Avoid photoshopping logos onto the clothes or gear our models use. And hey, let's keep the vibes positive online. We're all about positivity. Some of these rules are in our legal guidelines ( here ), but some are just based on trust and good intentions. Let's keep the vibes positive. Do I need to credit DTS or the creator? In short, it's not required. Remember, you're paying for the right to use these images, so you're all good. However, if you're feeling generous and want to give a shoutout to DTS or link back to the source image, we'd truly appreciate it! We're always thrilled to see brands and creators using our visuals and making waves online. While we're here to back you up, always remember: your brand takes center stage. Can I cancel anytime? Absolutely. No strings attached! What happens when I cancel my membership? When you join with a small membership fee, you get access to over 8,000 visuals + 500 new ones every month. That's right, it's not pay-per-image; everything on our platform is yours to use. Unlimited and unfiltered. But here's the catch: if you decide to cancel, we do expect you to stop using those visuals. Remember, your membership is essentially 'renting' the rights to use our stuff. If you cancel, that rental period ends. ‍ However, there's some good news for your existing posts. Any visuals you've already used in your social media posts? They can stay forever, as long as you credit @deathtostock. And for those images or videos you're especially attached to and want to use in future projects? We've got an option for you: you can buy out the license for those specific visuals. That way, they're yours to use forever. One of my best decisions " "> "Looking forward to more raises with these guys " "> "He zeroes in on what actually moves us forward " "> Secure Your Next Round Of Funding This Quarter Apply To Join Now 100% Free To Apply! 📚 Case Studies How LJ Went From “No Idea How to Raise” to an Oversubscribed Round in 60 Days How LJ Went From “No Idea How to Raise” to an Oversubscribed Round in 60 Days When LJ Shaik first reached out to us, he wasn’t just another founder trying to raise money — he was a builder with a real mission. Originally from rural India, LJ had experienced homelessness, taught himself software engineering, and moved to Berlin to build Hamhey AI: a platform helping immigrants and expats navigate global visa systems with less stress and more success. What he didn’t have? A pitch deck A model A dataroom Any investor experience Or frankly, any belief that he could raise money LJ told us straight up: he didn’t think working with a fundraising advisor was worth it. He thought fundraising was something only people “on the inside” could pull off. What We Did Together Once LJ decided to take the leap, we dove in. We worked side-by-side to build everything from the ground up — deck, story, numbers, outreach strategy. But most importantly, we helped LJ unlock and own the real story behind why Hamhey exists in the first place. “Max was able to bring out the real story, the raw story, behind me… MY why, and the company.” — LJ Shaik, Founder & CEO of Hamhey AI It wasn’t always pretty — a lot of late-night calls, drafts, rewrites, and mindset shifts — but LJ showed up, did the work, and got investor-ready fast. The Outcome Over a dozen VC meetings (U.S. & EU) in less than 2 months Accepted into Founder University, the accelerator run by Uber’s first investor Multiple soft-circled commitments from angels and VCs Round became oversubscribed And LJ now knows how to raise capital with confidence Not bad for a first-time founder who almost didn’t apply. “ I Thought I Just Needed Intros ” — Brandon Shi, Founder & CEO of PlatePost “ I Thought I Just Needed Intros ” — Brandon Shi, Founder & CEO of PlatePost When Brandon Shi cold DMed Max on Instagram, he wasn’t trying to hire a fundraising advisor. He was just a founder — deep in the grind — curious about what it takes to actually scale a startup. Brandon had already gone through the Antler startup program and was building PlatePost, a platform bringing restaurant menus to life with AI-generated, hyper-realistic food videos that help customers “eat with their eyes.” He had pitch experience. He had a vision. He had materials he felt pretty good about. He thought what he needed most was intros. Maybe an accelerator like Techstars. And that was it. What Actually Happened As Brandon and Max kept talking, things started to shift. What started as a few quick DMs turned into weeks of deep convos about founder mindset, narrative clarity, and how to actually sell a vision — not just fill in a slide deck. Max helped Brandon prep his Techstars application, rework his positioning, anticipate tough interview questions, and stretch his story to fit the true scale of his mission. And it paid off — big time. Brandon not only got into his top-choice Techstars program, he also secured a $220K investment. All before officially becoming a GoldCapital client. That early win and strong rapport made the decision easy — Brandon formally partnered with us to launch his full $2M Seed round. The Work We’ve Done (So Far) Even though the round’s still in motion, momentum has been real: Completely rebuilt the deck and story from scratch Finalized the dataroom and investor narrative Began work on a clean, compelling financial model Dozens of pitch reps and founder coaching sessions Brandon has already pitched the GP of a global food & beverage family office (yes, one you’ve heard of) Active warm intros are flowing to angels, VCs, and CVCs Brandon’s round isn’t closed yet — but for a founder who once thought “I just need connections,” he’s now seeing what happens when the right story meets the right process. Takeaway We hear it all the time: “I’ve got a deck, I just need intros.” “My story’s solid, I just need a shot.” “I know how to pitch — I just need warm leads.” Sometimes that’s true. Most of the time? There’s more work to do under the hood. Brandon came in with confidence and momentum — and still uncovered new ways to level up. His round isn’t just alive — it’s moving . And fast. If you’re serious about raising capital the right way — with the right help — apply now. We’ll help you do the hard work that actually gets the deal done. 🗺️ What To Expect 🗺️ What To Expect Sample Process & Timeline Secure Your Next Round Of Funding This Quarter Apply To Join Now 100% Free To Apply! pageText (crawler): Authentic Personal Brand Начин за Контакт: Тел: +44 7534 042903 Email: martinlolov98@gmail.com Instagram: @visual_esthetica For Revolutionaries, Courageous Healers, and soul-lead creators. Embody the conscious Creator, Activate your voice, share your message online and attract your dream clients Without sacrificing your soul to the algorithm or drowning in content that dissolves into the void… Book a Call Now 30-MIN FREE CONSULTATION Look, we can keep dancing around it... or we can actually dial it in. You open to jamming on a call? LET'S STOP MAKING STUPID PEOPLE FAMOUS. The collective consciousness is programmed by a select few influencers and leaders, and today, most of them only care about themselves. We need new leaders to rise on the Instagram platform to balance the scales. We need you to step up and speak out. So hear me when I ask... Are You Ready For The Activation? Transform your online presence from invisible to influential by design Architect systems that attract your soul-aligned clients while you sleep Create with precision instead of desperate frequency Stand shoulder-to-shoulder with warriors who remember why they came Claim authority in your domain without compromising Finally experience the freedom that comes from playing the long game, strategically, powerfully, on your terms ⚡️ THE NEW EARTH GUARANTEE Truth is the highest frequency. You can't make an informed decision from the outside looking in. That's why we invite you to enter the vortex, experience the program and community, and then decide. If it doesn't activate what you know you're here for, we'll process your refund immediately (within 30 days). No questions asked. This revolution has a consciousness of its own, and once you feel it you’ll remember why you came. Book a Call Now 30-MIN FREE CONSULTATION BEWARE: YOUR LIFE WILL NEVER BE THE SAME READY TO JOIN THIS REVOLUTION? Book a Call Now 30-MIN FREE CONSULTATION Thor Aarsand Thor is here to turn the spark inside you into a raging fire, and guide you into your highest authentic expression while building the business of your dreams. He has helped clients generate $11.5M and grow over 20M followers through their personal brands. He has helped over 10,000+ students revolutionize their relationship with social media and build a viral brand. A Norwegian Viking with fire in his veins, Thor abandoned the conventional path in 2016 to forge his own destiny. Since then, he's transmuted failures into wisdom, lessons into power, and vision into reality—proving that when you align with your soul mission, the Matrix has no choice but to bend. YOUR 12-MONTH MENTORSHIP INCLUDES... Sacred Branding Curriculum Eight transformative modules that teach you how to channel your story into an online presence that ripples across the planet. Live Weekly Coaching & Calls From content reviews to inner breakthroughs, you’ll be held in a rhythm of live guidance and powerful momentum. Onboarding Call with Thor Clarify your mission and map your brand’s next evolution in a private call with our founder and visionary brand architect. Daily Coaching with Justice Voice note support, personalized strategy, and deep encouragement from a coach who walks with you, not above you. Your Own AI Engine (NEO) A fully personalized AI assistant powered by your Human Design, astrology, and brand voice. Create content with sacred precision. Private Podcast Interview Share your story with the global community and position yourself as a voice of truth on the New Earth Network. Done-For-You Content + IG Feature Get featured on NEU Community IG and receive a pack of high-impact video content designed to amplify your message instantly. Affiliate Commissions ($1.5K+) Earn up to $1,500 per referral with our built-in affiliate system. Empower others while expanding your income. Global Mastermind Community Join a vibrant network of leaders, creators, and visionaries devoted to awakening the planet together 30-Day Risk-Free Guarantee You’ll know if this is for you within 30 days—or we give your investment back. No pressure, only truth. Book a Call Now 30-MIN FREE CONSULTATION Book Your FREE 30-min Consultation THE WARRIOR CODES FAQS CUSTOM JAVASCRIPT / HTML <div class="custom-faq-container"> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>Is there a payment plan or a way to make it more affordable for me?</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>Yes, we have flexible payment options as well as scholarships for those in more challenging financial situations or countries. Let's talk about what's realistic for you. We aren't here to add financial strain—we want your investment to stretch you just enough to call you forward, not overwhelm you. If it helps, we can look at breaking up the investment across 2, 3, or even more payments.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>I've invested in courses before and they didn't work. I'm worried to spend again.</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>I get it—being burned by past investments can make it hard to trust a new opportunity. Here's what's different: you're not doing this alone. The level of live support, real accountability, and daily connection inside this community is unmatched. But more than that, the game-changer is your level of engagement. If you show up, reach out, attend calls, and allow yourself to plug in—you'll see results. We also have a 30-day risk-free guarantee. If you show up, do the work, and it genuinely doesn't align for you, we'll part ways with gratitude, no questions asked and a full refund.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>I don't have an abundance mindset right now. What if I'm stuck?</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>That's exactly why this community exists. So many of us are conditioned by scarcity. Here, you'll be surrounded by people actively rewiring for abundance—not just in finances, but in energy, community, and possibility. Just by leaning into these calls, hearing success stories, and applying the mindset and business work, you begin to shift. We'll walk the journey together, step by step.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>I'm still battling my shadows. I don't feel ready to show up online authentically yet.</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>That fear is deeply human—and it's truly the doorway to your next breakthrough. None of us ever feel 100% ready to be fully seen. But your story as it is—messy, unfinished, true—is the medicine someone in the world needs. The community here exists precisely to walk with you through these edges, not expect you to have already mastered them. You will always be doing this work "in process," never as a finished product. The act of sharing, one pause at a time, is what dissolves the fear. Freedom is on the other side—not before, but through. And the beauty is, you won't do it alone.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>I'm scared of being judged once I put myself out there.</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>It's natural to worry about judgment, but if you show up with intention and heart, the right people will resonate deeply—and those who don't simply aren't your audience. Our entire approach is about purity of frequency, not performing or playing a role. Your vulnerability inspires others to be real, too. And yes, trolls and critics may appear, but with our energy hygiene tools and community support, you develop the resilience to let those comments pass right through. Your people will find you, because of—not in spite of—your honest & Vulnerable presence.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>How much time does this take? I work full time/have a busy schedule.</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>We built this curriculum with real life in mind. The core modules average 1 to 2 hours of total watch time each—you can break this into little sprints or focus blocks that work for you. Most students find that an hour a day, or 5 hours total a week, is more than enough to move steadily and see results. We'll help you create a personalized pacing plan during onboarding—whether you move quickly or slowly, you're always supported.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>Will I "just" be watching videos on my own?</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>No—this isn't a traditional "watch some videos and fend for yourself" course. You'll have Justice as your personal accountability coach, daily live calls, peer triads for check-in and reflection, and options for open Q&A nearly every weekday. The magic of this container is the real, live connection—and how much it keeps you inspired and accountable.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>How much time does it take to build my social media each day?</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>It depends on your workflow, but we're going to guide you through an efficient creator process. The more you batch content and use the templates and AI, the less time you spend each day. In the beginning, yes, there's a learning curve—but once you find your rhythm, many creators block out a single session to ideate, record, and edit a week's worth of content, then spend just minutes per day posting and engaging. We'll help you find the most joyful, sustainable workflow for your life.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>I've done self-paced courses in the past, but they didn't work for me. I need more personalized attention.</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>This is a personal mentorship container, not just a self-paced program. Justice will meet 1:1 with you in onboarding, help you map out your schedule, and support you privately in the Discord. You'll also get access to Thor and other coaches in live calls several times a week. Plus, you'll be paired with accountability triads and surrounded by other live learners—not stuck consuming content alone. You are seen, supported, and encouraged at every step, and we adapt the pacing to your real-world life.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>How much time do I get with Thor personally?</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>You'll have a one-on-one onboarding call with Thor to clarify your vision and direction, plus live access to him during the two weekly teaching and feedback sessions every week. That's far more proximity than most programs offer.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>I love Thor's content, but everyone's starting to look and sound the same. Will my brand really be unique?</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>This is something we've worked hard to address. With the implementation of our personalized AI engine (Neo), every student gets a customized brand content blueprint based on your story, your astrology, your human design, and your voice. We're not here to create copies of Thor—we're here to unleash the unique medicine and resonance of your soul's mission. You'll be guided to refine your own aesthetic, messaging, and content style, not just fit into a mold. Your brand will be a true reflection of you.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>How long does it usually take to get a client/start earning results?</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>It depends where you're starting and the effort you bring. If you're building your brand, service, and offers from scratch, expect to spend 3-4 months laying the foundations and integrating the strategy. If you already have a business, you can plug these templates and frameworks in and begin attracting more leads and clients much sooner—some see results within the first month. Wherever you're starting, we walk with you and help you set clear, achievable milestones.</p> </div> </div> <div class="custom-faq-item"> <div class="custom-faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)"> <p>How long will it take to go viral or build a big following?</p> <span> <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/S3s6tOUXKQkmnAqizDUj/media/67b389b3145bb724fe238289.png" alt="Icon" class="custom-faq-icon"> </span> </div> <div class="custom-faq-answer"> <p>Virality isn't something you can engineer on demand—it's a byproduct of authentic, consistent showing up. With our system, you'll learn how to position your content so it has viral potential ("viral proneness"), but we focus on building trust and resonance with your ideal audience. Some posts pop early, some build over time. The most important thing is to show up, be real, and allow growth to unfold as a reward, not the goal. Consistency, not chasing viral metrics, is the real path to impact and legacy.</p> </div> </div> </div> <style> /* Scoped styles to prevent affecting other funnel elements */ .custom-faq-container { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; Price: Tuition covered APPLY FOR SCHOLARSHIP APPLY FOR FELLOWSHIP Masterclass Rome 2026 4-day immersive programme on vision, power, and future-making DISCOVER THE 4-DAY PROGRAMME Modul I In the Artist's MInd The artist is the prototype of the visionary. Observe them, as if under a bell jar, to grasp the essential dynamics of vision itself.  Modul II What is a VIsion Defintions, Vision Equation, Vision Formula and Vision Path to understand the basic grammar of visionary thinking Modul III Exploration of the Internal World Until your vision becomes clear, the external world remains given, only the inner world can be shaped. Modul VI Inner point of Vision Reframing past and future narrative allow vision to emerge in the present ​ ​ Modul V Understanding of External World To formulate a vision today is to engage contemporary forces critically, decode their mechanisms, and transform from within their logic. Modul VI Visionary in History How great mind shaped society during history ​ ​ ​ Modul VII Detecting Weak Signals Weak signals are early signs of change small, marginal, or unexpected phenomena that reveal how the future is taking shape in the present. Modul VIII Vision's Intelligence The power of Time, Symbols, Imagination, Paradox and Meaning allow to gain different visionary intelligence SCHOOL OF VISION APPLY NOW ABOUT MODULES CONTACTS ABOUT What is the School of Vision Masterclass Four days of intensive work across three layers: ​   Classroom sessions on vision as strategy — how to state the future you are building, why it matters, and how to make it non-negotiable. Field access to Rome’s living power infrastructure — innovation hubs, private archives, architectural studios shaping the city’s next form. Closed-door feedback from people who operate at city, brand, and institutional level. ​ ​ ROME CHAPTER 4-day Masterclass April 2026   Admission is by application. We design each cohort around fit, ambition, and friction: people who are actively entering a phase of definition, expansion, or leadership. April 2026 4 days in Rome Build a clear, non-negotiable vision and learn how to make it real, through three layers of work:   CLASSROOM Vision as strategy State the future you’re building, why it matters, and how to hold the line. FIELDWORK IN ROME Inside the city’s power infrastructure Innovation hubs, private archives, and leading architecture studios   CLOSED-DOOR FEEDBACK Direct input From people operating at city, brand, and institutional level. RESERVE YOUR SPOT IN ROME WHAT HAPPENS IN 4 DAYS ROME. UP CLOSE. An intimate, curated cohort. Declare the vision. Refine the identity. Enter places the public can’t. Turn symbolic language into strategy. DISCOVER THE PROGRAMME WORKSHOPS 12+ hours of in-room strategic work. Vision as strategy: define the future you’re building. Attach it to symbolic power; make it defensible in public. Take a position, stress-test it, refine it. VISITS Strategic field access to active power sites. Rome’s working infrastructure: innovation hubs, private archives, architecture studios shaping the next masterplan, artist research spaces. See how identity, territory, luxury, and policy are produced. MENTORING Closed-door feedback from active operators Direct sessions with people shaping Rome’s cultural narrative, institutional agenda, urban form, and brand position. No panels, no audience—sit down, present your direction, get real feedback. Led by Visionaries Years of work have turned visionary thinking into action by building situations where culture, space and institutions meet.   In our last edition (Rome Masterclass 2025) participants spent four days in studios, fieldwork and expert encounters —  ENI ROAD, Palazzo della Civiltà (Fendi Archives)  — with lecturers & guests including Cristiana Perrella (MACRO), Jacopo Costanzo, Sebastiano Caputo, Matteo Costanzo / Lab Roma 050, Studio Labics, Numero Cromatico and art critic and historian Ludovico Pratesi ​ Speakers and activities vary by edition. Trusted by Visionaries Across Sectors Our Vision-Driven-System™ method has been tested and applied within leading organisations across finance, green-tech, pharma, logistics, and academia—including: WHO IS IT FOR The School of Vision is for those who see before others see. Whether you're a creative , entrepreneur , researcher , or executive , you’ll join a close circle of individuals ready to question what’s established and imagine what’s next. ​ Ideal for people in transition , expansion , or leadership roles — or those who know that vision is their real edge. RESERVE YOUR SPOT IN ROME OUTCOMES Throughout the programme, participants will learn to:   > Tools to make sense of complexity with a systemic mindset > The ability to read the present and detect weak signals of the future > A deeper practice of symbolic and associative thinking > Skills to craft storytelling that’s both meaningful and visionary > A mindset that unites logic and intuition into one way of thinking > A distinct personal identity and a vision that is unmistakably yours > Access to a network of visionary minds and mentors > Insight into the Western blueprint of vision, through the lens of Italian cities DISCOVER THE PROGRAMME In-Class Modules PROVEN IMPACT "it helped me to discover a new creative part of myself" Francesca A. Expressing my inner world made me realise how instinct can serve as a compass. I’ll try to remember that more often" Vicky C. "What struck me the most was the power of the artistic approach to push you out of your comfort zone and spark lateral thinking" Virginia V. "What surprised me the most was the difficulty and sense of inadequacy I felt when trying to reflect on my own “why.” Alex V. "Seeing things differently" Claudio N. ABOUT Scholarships ​ If you are a young creative, we want to offer you the opportunity to join our community.   We have reserved a limited number of scholarships to support talented young  artists, curators, and creatives who might not otherwise have access to this opportunity. We believe that including diverse voices and experiences enriches the entire community, creating a space where everyone can grow, connect, and be inspired.   Applications are now open for selection. Apply today. ​ APPLY FOR SCHOLARSHIP FAQ General Information School of Vision Masterclass is an immersive learning experience that blends art, strategy, and personal transformation. Unlike traditional courses, it uses creative and symbolic thinking to unlock bold ideas and build a unique method for visionary leadership. Programme and Schedule How long is the course, and what’s the daily schedule like? The course lasts four days, typically running from morning to early evening. Each day is a mix of immersive workshops, guided exercises, and unexpected experiences designed to open your mind and expand your vision. Fees and Payments What does the course cost, and what’s included? The fee includes all workshops, materials, mentoring sessions, selected meals, and access to unique venues. Travel and accommodation are not included. Flexible payment plans and partial refunds are available—see below for details. ​ The early bird fee is 1300 €, full price 2500 € Is the Masterclass for artist? The School of Vision is cross-disciplinary. Our participants include entrepreneurs, researchers, designers, policymakers, cultural leaders, and creatives — anyone who wants to lead with vision in complex environments. Travel and Accomodation Do you help with travel and lodging? We provide a list of nearby accommodation and travel tips upon confirmation. While we don’t offer booking services, we’re happy to assist with recommendations. Language What language is the course in? The course is held in English. If you're unsure about your level, don’t worry—we prioritise clarity and a supportive environment for everyone. How many seats are available? We keep each cohort small and selective to ensure depth of learning and strong connections. Places are limited to max 25, granted on a rolling basis. Methodology What is Vision-Driven-System™? It’s our signature method: a structured yet intuitive framework that helps you develop a compelling vision by combining symbolic thinking, strategic design, and personal insight. Collaboration and Partners Can organisations collaborate with School of Vision? Yes. We design custom experiences for companies and institutions aligned with our values. If you're interested, reach out—we’re always open to visionary partnerships. Still have Questions? Can’t find what you’re looking for? We’re here to help. Feel free to reach out via email or the contact form—someone from our team will get back to you shortly. E-commerce & DTC brands Tech & SaaS companies Health & wellness brands Finance, legal & professional services Home improvement & real estate Travel & hospitality Beauty, skincare & fashion Book Your Free Call Now Brands we can’t help Smoking, Vaping or CBD brands Politics, Gambling, or Adult Content Media Outlets or Publishing Platforms Marketers or marketing agencies Music Artists, Models, Films, Artists or Fiction Writers Jewellery & Fashion Brands Artists or art brands Proud to be top-rated on TrustPilot. What do you need from me? After a decade in digital marketing and SEO, we know what works when it comes to link building. We've helped brands across many industries secure high-quality, impactful backlinks that drive real SEO results. The key to our success (and why we can offer such effective link building at a great value) is our honest, strategic approach—we’re upfront about the brands we can help, how we can help, and what we need from you to make it happen. A well-optimised website Backlinks are powerful, but they work best when your site is technically sound, user-friendly, and has content worth linking to. If your website isn’t ready to benefit from high-quality links, we’ll advise on improvements before kicking off outreach. A brand spokesperson Many of the best backlinks come from expert commentary / media contributions. Having a founder, CEO, or industry expert who can provide insights makes it easier to secure high-authority links in top publications. Be open-minded We focus on securing high-quality, relevant links that drive real SEO impact and this means crafting creative pitches. We aim for relevance to your exact niche, though some flexibility is required. The right time & budget expectations Quality link building isn’t an overnight fix or a bargain service. It requires strategic outreach, relationship-building, and content placement to secure good results. The more time and budget you invest, the more sustainable your SEO growth will be. Book Your Free Call Now We love delivering great news Book Your Free Call Now A few kind words from our happy clients! “These guys are great, particularly for a small business like mine. They provide a personalised service and it seems that nothing is too much trouble. The whole team is so incredibly friendly and personable, and it feels like they are as excited about my business as I am.” —Sara, The Bark Side “This service is so well thought out and so effective for small businesses. They deserve every piece of praise I can heap on them. Thanks team.” —Gordon, Gordon’s Knight “[They] are amazing - they are totally open, they have great systems and communications - they have already been getting me national coverage for a price I'm totally happy with. Dream come true.” —Ben, Hugo Energy App “Brilliant company, wouldn't hesitate to use them again. The staff really go out of their way to support with your needs; it does really seem like a place that cares.” —Jack, Slothmove “Seriously, these guys deliver in weeks! Don't think about it - just hire them. —Grant Pierrus “We've worked with [them] for over 6 months now and have been very pleased with the service… we've had some great articles published in big publications. I would highly recommend.” —Max, Classic Interiors Still Have Questions? We’ve Got You Is there any eligibility criteria? Yes, you’ll need to be ‘PR-ready’: Well-optimised website. A spokesperson we can use for expert comments. Be open-minded about content. Have the budget and patience (it takes a few months to deliver links). When chatting with our team on our initial discovery call we’ll establish whether we’re the right fit for each other. After our call, if we think we can help, we'll send you a proposal with a plan for your brand and next steps. How do I sign up? Book in chat and if we think we’d be a good fit for each other, we’ll create a plan for you and share a link for you to sign-up. Are there any extra costs? Nothing at all! We help you secure organic media coverage - no paid placements here. Do I need to do anything? No - just sit back and we’ll deliver the links. Where can I read reviews of your service? We’d rather show you than tell you! We’re proud of our Excellent rating on TrustPilot. Check out our recent reviews on Trustpilot . How do I know when I have a link? We provide real-time media monitoring, so you’ll receive instant notifications when we secure you each link. How long does it take to see results? Link building is a long-term SEO strategy, and results depend on factors like your industry, competition, and existing domain authority. Most clients see an improvement in organic traffic, search rankings, and domain authority within 3 to 6 months , but high-quality backlinks continue to add value over time What kind of sites do you get links from? We secure high-authority, relevant, and trustworthy websites across a variety of industries, including news publications, niche blogs, and authoritative online magazines. Our focus is on editorial backlinks , meaning your links come from real, high-quality content on reputable sites . Can I review the pitch before you submit it? We don’t offer pre-approval of pitches. Speed is key in PR—journalists receive a flood of pitches, and we want yours to be among the first they see. That said, we always focus on securing high-quality, relevant backlinks from authoritative sites in your industry. Our approach ensures natural, editorial links that provide long-term SEO value and credibility. Can I choose my anchor text? No, sorry. Journalists decide on the anchor text themselves. In most cases, they’ll use a branded anchor (your business name or personal name). Why does it take a few weeks to land the first link? Can we speed it up? We start pitching right away, but journalists work on their own schedules, and some sites have longer editorial processes. While we aim to secure placements as quickly as possible, the timeline is ultimately in their hands. That said, sometimes links land sooner—but we can’t guarantee it. Do you have a minimum DR for billable links? Yes, we guarantee a minimum Average Domain Rating (DR) of 70. Are these Do Follow or No Follow links? These links include a mix of Follow and No Follow (nofollow) links — and we charge for both, because both are genuinely high-value . While dofollow links are often seen as more desirable, Google now treats nofollow as a “hint” , not a rule — meaning even nofollow links can still pass value, especially when they come from trusted editorial media sources . Our placements appear in real articles on sites like Forbes, USA Today, The Sun, and Business Insider , which Google already views as credible and authoritative. It’s important to note: these are not sponsored or guest post links , which provide little SEO benefit and increasingly come with risk. Sponsored and guest post links should be marked as "sponsored", which Google treats just like "nofollow" — but many sites fail to disclose them properly. When that happens, Google may penalise the linking site and the one being linked to , damaging your domain’s authority. Our links, by contrast, are earned through editorial inclusion — not payment for placement. They’re safe, natural, and exactly the kind of link Google rewards over time. 👉 That’s why top SEO agencies across the US, UK, and Canada white-label our media link service for their own clients . These links are in high demand — because they’re credible, effective, and safe . Do syndicated links count toward my order? Syndicated articles with links: We’ll count one link (regardless of dofollow or nofollow) from syndicated content toward your order. Any additional versions will only count if they are dofollow . Can I build links to specific pages? Most links will point to your homepage—that’s typically how journalists link when quoting sources. Can I white label this service? Yes - we can white label this service. Book Your Strategy Call Trusted by 75+ brands Check Out Our Podcast Ads Your Unfair Advantage in 2025 The average customer has evolved. Years of exposure to endless marketing have given them a sixth sense for ads. Their internal radar catches and filters out traditional advertising before it even registers. But there's a backdoor their defense system hasn't patched: the human brain's hardwired attraction to authentic conversation. While their guard is up against polished commercials and scripted pitches, podcast-style ads slip right through. Why? Because they don't trigger the "this is an ad" alarm. They’re like the perfect Trojan horse: Looks like premium entertainment content Feels like a natural conversation Hits with the production value of top-tier media Delivers your message before defenses kick in Book a Call Our Process Creative Strategy Most brands struggle with knowing what to say in their ads. We take the guesswork out of the equation. Our team crafts compelling, story-driven podcast ad angles that hook your audience, keep them engaged, and drive action. Whether you need a viral hook, a deep-dive testimonial, or an authority-driven message—we map out a strategy designed to sell . Netflix Studio-Quality Production Forget shaky, low-quality UGC videos. We film in a Netflix-grade studio with cinematic cameras , giving your ads an elevated, high-production look while maintaining an authentic, unscripted feel. Director On-Site : Unlike traditional UGC where creators film on their own (and often miss the mark), we ensure every shot is optimized for performance. Multiple Takes, Multiple Variations : We test different hooks, camera angles, and delivery styles in real time so you have variations to work with. ‍ Controlled Environment : No more worrying about bad lighting, audio issues, or unprofessional setups we control it all . B-Roll Footage Included A polished podcast ad is great, but real-life footage makes it convert. After the studio shoot, we send your product home with the creator so they can film authentic B-roll that blends seamlessly with the studio footage. Hands-on product shots Casual lifestyle moments Close-ups that bring the story to life This hybrid approach gives your ads the perfect mix of polished and raw making them feel real, engaging, and built to convert. Creator Sourcing We Find the Perfect Talent Finding the right creators is everything , and we take care of it all. Whether you need: A charismatic actor ‍‍A relatable parent A fitness creator with a six-pack A 50-year-old grandmother We handle the outreach, vetting, and negotiation so you don’t have to. No more creator headaches just the right talent, ready to film. Tired of Wasting Money on Ads That Don’t Work? Get Creatives That Sell Book Now Why Podcast Ads Are The Next Wave Other agencies High CPMs – UGC fatigue is real. Audiences are blind to TikTok-style ads that all look the same. Low watch times – Most UGC ads get skipped within 3 seconds. You're constantly cycling through creators to find one that works. Constantly testing & burning cash – UGC is a volume game. You need dozens of iterations just to find a winner. Costly creator churn – You’re always hunting for the next UGC creator, negotiating rates, and dealing with inconsistent quality. Podcast Ads Lower CPMs & unique placement – Podcasts break the pattern. They feel fresh and organic, making them perform better in a crowded feed. Longer watch times – Podcast clips hold attention. They feel like real conversations, not an ad. Less creative fatigue, higher trust – Podcast-style ads leverage authority and expertise, making them convert faster. Higher-quality production, better performance – Professional audio & visuals make the ad feel premium and credible, increasing conversions. Client Results Book Your Strategy Call 3.2 x ROAS Average return on ad spend across all campaigns 52 % Hook Rate More than half of viewers are engaged within the first 3 seconds 38 % Lower CPA Drastically reducing acquisition costs What's Included Complete Production We handle everything A to Z, so you don’t have to lift a finger. We source the creators, book the studio, and have a professional director on-site to oversee the shoot. Raw Footage You get every single asset camera footage, high-fidelity microphone recordings, and multiple angles in crisp 4K quality. No restrictions, no compressed files. Unlimited Variations Unlike traditional UGC creators that limit you to 1-3 hooks, we give as many as you need. Whether you want 5, 10, or even 20+ hooks, different hooks, call-to-actions, or delivery styles we make sure you have everything needed to find the perfect winning ad. Creator Sourcing No more struggling to find the right creator. We source and onboard creators that fit your exact brand. Need a specific persona? Whether it's a mom, fitness creator, or even an 80-year-old grandmother we’ll find them. Quick Turnaround We know that fast implementation is key for media buyers. That’s why we guarantee quick delivery times, so you can launch new ads fast and stay ahead of fatigue. At Home B-Roll Footage We know that high-performing ads aren’t just about talking they need visual storytelling. That’s why we don’t just capture the podcast; we film extra B-roll footage of the creator actually using the product at home. Whether it’s product close-ups, unboxing shots, or lifestyle scenes, you’ll get everything you need. Book a Call What Our Clients are Saying Have Questions? Have a question? Book your strategy call. Book a Call How long does production take? Super quick you'll get your ads in 2 weeks. How are podcast-style ads different from regular ads? They just feel more real. Instead of salesy UGC that makes people scroll past, these podcast ads blend into feeds naturally. Your audience feels like they're just listening in on a genuine conversation. Do I need to pay extra for creators and studio stuff? Nope! It's all included in the package price. Don't worry about any surprise fees for talent, studio time, or equipment. Where's your studio? We're based in Toronto Canada, but don't worry about accents our creators have neutral North American accent. Plus we've got creators who speak other languages if you need that. Can I get the raw files? For sure! You'll get all the high-quality raw footage with full usage rights. Use it however you want for other marketing content. Do you do the editing? Depends on what you want! We can do full editing or just give you the raw footage it’s up to you. Can I pick the creators? 100%! We'll show you the creators first to make sure you're happy with the actors casted before the shoot day. Ready to scale with better creatives? Book a 9-minute call with us. Demand Curve’s Growth Program 2.0 is a modern growth platform that helps startups build and scale their entire growth engine—from acquisition, conversion, monetization, and beyond. If you're leading growth for your startup, our strategy playbooks help you define the right growth model, align your “five pillars of growth” (if there’s any secret to growth, this is it), and build a prioritized roadmap of what to build and when. Then, you'll follow our step-by-step projects and recipes that show you exactly how to build, test, and optimize everything from acquisition channels to landing pages, onboarding flows, and more. If you're supporting growth at a startup, the program is your on-demand toolkit. It helps you learn quickly, solve real problems, and ship faster without having to Google your way through it or waste countless hours trying to figure things out from scratch. Whether you're looking to level up your growth knowledge or build your company’s entire growth system, the program gives you the guidance, structure, and tools to do it without hiring expensive experts or going it alone. What topics are covered in the program? The program includes 50+ strategic and tactical playbooks across every major aspect of startup growth—plus even more step-by-step projects, templates, and cheat sheets to help you move faster without the guesswork. You’ll learn how to craft your growth strategy, identify and prioritize acquisition channels, and build high-converting funnels that scale. Topics span positioning, brand strategy, paid acquisition, conversion flows, pricing, monetization, and more. We cover dozens of the most effective acquisition channels and all major “growth motions” (paid, content, sales, PLG). Basically, however your startup needs to grow—we’ve got it covered. If you're joining to solve a specific growth problem, you'll get value immediately—most playbooks and projects are built to help you ship in a matter of hours. From there, think of the program as your on-demand growth resource. Pop back in whenever you need support tackling the next challenge.
